name: Brain MRI Epilepsy Protocol
description: Dedicated brain MRI protocol for evaluation of epilepsy including thin-section hippocampal and temporal lobe imaging

findings.technique: Dedicated epilepsy protocol MRI including thin-slice T1, T2, FLAIR, coronal oblique FLAIR through hippocampus, diffusion tensor imaging, and post-contrast sequences when indicated.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Hippocampi
sections.content: The right hippocampus demonstrates [normal T2 signal / no hippocampal sclerosis / normal morphology]. The left hippocampus demonstrates [normal T2 signal / no hippocampal sclerosis / normal morphology]. No asymmetric atrophy.

sections.name: Temporal Lobes
sections.content: The bilateral temporal lobes demonstrate [normal cortical thickness / no focal cortical dysplasia / no temporal lobe atrophy]. The temporal horn is [not dilated / symmetric].

sections.name: Parainsula and Amygdala
sections.content: The bilateral amygdalae demonstrate [normal T2 signal / no abnormality]. The parainsular region is [unremarkable / normal].

sections.name: Cortex
sections.content: The cerebral cortex demonstrates [normal gray-white matter differentiation / no focal cortical dysplasia / no heterotopic gray matter]. No malformation of cortical development.

sections.name: White Matter
sections.content: The white matter demonstrates [no abnormal T2 signal / no demyelination / no white matter lesion]. No focal white matter abnormality.

sections.name: Mesial Temporal Structures
sections.content: The fornix and mammillary bodies are [intact / normal]. No abnormal signal in the mesial temporal structures.

sections.name: Ventricles
sections.content: The lateral ventricles are [normal in size / not dilated]. The temporal horns are [not prominent / symmetric].

sections.name: Extra-Temporal
sections.content: The frontal, parietal, and occipital lobes are [unremarkable / no abnormality]. No extra-temporal focus for epileptogenic activity.

sections.name: Vascular
sections.content: No vascular malformation such as cavernous malformation or developmental venous anomaly identified.

impression:
1. Normal dedicated epilepsy protocol MRI.
2. No hippocampal sclerosis, focal cortical dysplasia, or malformation of cortical development identified.
3. No vascular malformation to suggest epileptogenic focus.
author: RadReport Templates
